# Fetcher

> A modular HTTP client ecosystem built on the native Fetch API with interceptor-powered middleware and native LLM streaming support. Published as an npm monorepo under `@ahoo-wang/*`.

## Onboarding

- [Contributor Guide](/onboarding/contributor) — For new contributors: language foundations, architecture, getting productive
- [Staff Engineer Guide](/onboarding/staff-engineer) — Architectural deep dive, design tradeoffs, decision log
- [Executive Guide](/onboarding/executive) — Capability map, risk assessment, technology investment thesis
- [Product Manager Guide](/onboarding/product-manager) — Feature map, user journeys, competitive landscape

## Getting Started

- [Introduction](/guide/) — Overview of the Fetcher ecosystem, package graph, key features
- [Quick Start](/guide/quick-start) — Installation, basic usage, interceptors, decorators, LLM streaming
- [Configuration](/guide/configuration) — FetcherOptions, NamedFetcher, FetcherRegistrar, environment configs
- [Contributing](/guide/contributing) — Development setup, testing, code style, PR process

## Architecture

- [Overview](/architecture/) — System architecture, package dependency graph, design principles
- [Fetcher Core](/architecture/fetcher-core) — Fetcher class, NamedFetcher, request lifecycle, error handling
- [Interceptor System](/architecture/interceptors) — InterceptorManager, request/response/error chain, custom interceptors
- [EventStream & SSE](/architecture/eventstream) — Side-effect module, SSE protocol, LLM streaming
- [URL Builder](/architecture/url-builder) — Path parameters, query parameters, base URL resolution

## Packages

- [Overview](/packages/) — All 12 packages with descriptions and dependencies
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher](/packages/fetcher) — Core HTTP client
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-decorator](/packages/decorator) — TypeScript decorators for API services
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-eventbus](/packages/eventbus) — Event bus (serial, parallel, broadcast)
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-eventstream](/packages/eventstream) — SSE/streaming side-effect module
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-openai](/packages/openai) — OpenAI API client integration
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-openapi](/packages/openapi) — OpenAPI 3.x TypeScript types
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-generator](/packages/generator) — CLI code generator from OpenAPI specs
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-react](/packages/react) — React hooks for data fetching
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-storage](/packages/storage) — Cross-environment storage abstraction
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-cosec](/packages/cosec) — CoSec authentication integration
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-wow](/packages/wow) — Wow DDD/CQRS framework integration
- [@ahoo-wang/fetcher-viewer](/packages/viewer) — React + Ant Design component library

## API Reference

- [Overview](/api/) — API surface summary and navigation
- [Fetcher Client](/api/fetcher-client) — Fetcher class, FetcherOptions, RequestConfig, error types
- [Decorators](/api/decorators) — @api, @get, @post, @put, @delete, @path, @query, @body
- [React Hooks](/api/react-hooks) — useFetcher, useQuery, usePromise
- [Type Definitions](/api/type-definitions) — Key TypeScript interfaces across packages

## Testing

- [Overview](/testing/) — Testing strategy, tools (Vitest, MSW, Playwright)
- [Unit Testing](/testing/unit-testing) — Vitest setup, MSW mocking, testing patterns
- [Integration Testing](/testing/integration-testing) — Real API testing, setup, environment
- [Browser Testing](/testing/browser-testing) — Playwright, jsdom, component testing, Storybook
